iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 42% (up). Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. ~200 injured Dimona/Arad (up from 180+, Guardian). Iran fired 400+ ballistic missiles at Israel since war start, 92% intercepted. IAEA: no radiation at Dimona. Trump power plant obliteration threat active. Iran parliament speaker: 'irreversible damage' to regional infrastructure if power plants hit. Iran retains 'effective command and control' per CNN expert. Updated 2026-03-22T12:00:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. 100% (capped, IMMINENT). Trump 48hr ultimatum ACTIVE - deadline ~23:44 GMT Mon Mar 24 (~37hrs remaining). Iran DISMISSED ultimatum. Qalibaf (parliament speaker): 'irreversible damage' to ALL regional infrastructure if power plants hit. Iran launched NEW attacks on Israel. ~200 injured Dimona/Arad. 400+ missiles at Israel (92% intercepted). MEU (2,500 troops) deploying. Russia benefits from eased sanctions. Markets fear Black Monday. Israel demolishing Lebanese frontline homes. Updated 2026-03-22T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Iranian missiles injure 160 in Arad and Dimona — interceptors failed
latest_news.text: 84 injured in Arad, 78 in Dimona from Iranian ballistic missiles that penetrated Israeli air defenses. 10-year-old boy seriously hurt in Dimona. Interceptors launched but failed to hit threats. State of emergency declared in Arad.

latest_news.headline: Marine Expeditionary Unit deploying to Middle East — 2,500 combat troops
latest_news.text: MEU departed Japan, another from California — both heading to Middle East. Analysts suggest Kharg Island seizure as potential objective. Trump: 'If I were sending ground troops, I wouldn't tell you.'

latest_news.headline: Iran warns: attack Kharg Island and we'll set fire to energy facilities regionwide
latest_news.text: Iran state media warns any attack on Kharg Island (90% of Iran oil exports) would cause 'insecurity in the Red Sea' and 'set fire to energy facilities throughout the region' — major escalation threat.

latest_news.headline: NCTC Director Joe Kent resigns over opposition to Iran war
latest_news.text: US National Counterterrorism Center director Joe Kent resigns, speaking out against Iran war at prayer event. Says he opposed the conflict — internal US dissent signal.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 66% (stable). Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. ~80%+ (IMMINENT via coupling). Israel striking across Beirut + Tehran simultaneously. Hamas official killed in Beirut strike. IDF demolishing Lebanese frontline village homes (accelerated). Ground fighting in S. Lebanon continues. 1,000+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Hezbollah full barrages ongoing. Updated 2026-03-22T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. ~2% base, ~17% with coupling (DETERRENT). No new incidents. 3 Patriot batteries at Incirlik. Stable. Updated 2026-03-22T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 3% (stable). Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. ~3% (DETERRENT). No new developments. Removed stale india_pakistan_border signal. Stable. Updated 2026-03-22T12:00:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 14% (up). Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. ~15% base (DETERRENT). US issues 30-day waiver for countries to buy sanctioned Russian oil - easing sanctions benefits Moscow. Zelensky: 'Putin wants long war in Iran - depletion of US reserves.' Putin calls Iran 'loyal friend.' No new NATO-Russia incidents. Updated 2026-03-22T12:00:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. ~5% (DETERRENT). US-China trade talks continue. Taiwan Strait stable. No new PLA activity. Updated 2026-03-22T12:00:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. ~2% (DETERRENT). SPA 15th Session: Workers Party won all 687 seats. Constitutional revision expected. No military escalation. Updated 2026-03-22T12:00:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 30% (up). Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. ~42% base (CRITICAL). Kremlin: peace talks 'situational pause' due to Iran war. Russia ABSENT from Florida talks. ISW: Russian mechanized assaults intensifying - spring-summer offensive prep. US eases Russian oil sanctions (30-day waiver) - Zelensky warns Putin benefits from long Iran war. Witkoff sessions continue Sun with Ukraine only. Updated 2026-03-22T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: US-backed Ukraine-Russia talks continue, more sessions Sunday
latest_news.text: Ukraine and Russia trade strikes as US-brokered talks in Florida continue. Deaths reported on both sides. More negotiating sessions scheduled for Sunday.

latest_news.headline: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 26% (stable). Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. ~29% (ELEVATED). Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 24 (Saudi/Qatar/Turkey request). TTP also truce. No new fighting. Post-Eid resumption feared Mar 25. Updated 2026-03-22T12:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA: no radiation at Dimona. US-China trade talks ongoing. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~37hrs to deadline. Iran: 'irreversible damage' to ALL regional infrastructure. Russia benefits from sanctions waiver. Israel demolishing Lebanese homes. 400+ missiles at Israel. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline with RECIPROCAL THREATS intensifying.

latest_news.headline: Iran parliament speaker: 'irreversible damage' to regional infrastructure if power plants attacked
latest_news.text: Qalibaf on X: 'Immediately after power plants targeted, critical infrastructure, energy infrastructure, and oil facilities throughout region will be legitimate targets and destroyed in irreversible manner, oil prices will remain high for long time.'

latest_news.headline: ~200 injured in Iranian missile strikes near Dimona nuclear facility
latest_news.text: About 200 people wounded in Iranian strikes on Dimona and Arad in southern Israel. Air defense systems failed to intercept projectiles near nuclear facility. 10-year-old boy seriously hurt.

latest_news.headline: Russia benefits from Iran war — US eases Russian oil sanctions
latest_news.text: Trump admin issues 30-day waiver for countries to buy sanctioned Russian oil to ease prices. Zelensky to BBC: 'Putin wants long war in Iran — depletion of US reserves, air defense manufacturers.' Many European countries condemn the sanctions easing.

latest_news.headline: Israel instructs military to speed up demolition of Lebanese homes in 'frontline villages'
latest_news.text: Israel instructs military to accelerate demolition of Lebanese homes in border 'frontline villages' — expanding infrastructure destruction campaign in southern Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: 400+ Iranian ballistic missiles at Israel since war start, 92% intercepted
latest_news.text: Britain says no evidence Iran has nukes. 400+ ballistic missiles fired at Israel, ~92% intercepted. Remaining 8% caused ~200 injuries at Dimona/Arad and other sites.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 12:00 UTC). Trump 48hr ultimatum ~37hrs to deadline. Iran DISMISSED ultimatum and threatened 'IRREVERSIBLE DAMAGE' to ALL regional infrastructure (Qalibaf). ~200 injured Dimona/Arad. Iran launched NEW attacks on Israel. Russia BENEFITS from US sanctions waiver — Zelensky warns Putin wants long Iran war. Israel demolishing Lebanese frontline homes. 400+ missiles at Israel (92% intercepted). No diplomatic off-ramps visible. Power plant strikes + regional energy retaliation highly likely within 37hrs.
de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 11 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA: no radiation. Russia-Ukraine Florida talks ongoing (Ukraine side). ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~8hrs to deadline. Iran dismissed ultimatum, threatens ALL US energy infra retaliation. Markets fear Black Monday. Israel intensifying Lebanon strikes. Russia-Ukraine talks PAUSED by Kremlin due to Iran war. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline with reciprocal threats escalating.
